name: hidden alcove
hints: A hidden alcove with a chopping block, skull, and a box.
LOO SKU or LOO BOX to examine the items. The box may contain something.
OPEN BOX to find treasures inside. The skull may contain something too.
LOO SKU reveals gold teeth. OPEN BOX or LOO BOX reveals hidden items. W=burial room (8).
notes: Hidden alcove with skull (contains gold teeth treasure), box (contains treasures), and chopping block. W=burial room (8).
